{"id":"smallhold-7tw","title":"Inbound Move: verify alsoKnownAs, migrate follows to new actor","description":"Handle Move{actor: old_actor_uri, object: new_actor_uri}. Verify the new actor's document has alsoKnownAs containing the old actor URI — reject if not. For each local account that follows the old actor: create a follow for the new actor, enqueue a Follow activity to the new actor's inbox, remove the old follow. Update old actor record with a moved_to marker.

**Agent workflow**: Spawn a research subagent to find real Move activity examples and document the alsoKnownAs verification flow from mastodon.social.

**Test discipline**:
- Move with valid alsoKnownAs: follows migrated atomically
- Move without alsoKnownAs: rejected with clear error
- Move to actor on suspended domain: rejected
- Move when no local accounts follow old actor: 200, no-op
All fixtures captured from real server interactions. Real in-memory SQLite for DB tests — never mock.

**Defensive programming**:
- Wrap the entire migration in a transaction — either all follows migrate or none
- Do not re-migrate if already migrated (check for existing follows to new actor)
- No .unwrap() outside test code; all errors Result<T, AppError>
- Validate inputs at system boundaries","acceptance_criteria":"Valid Move with alsoKnownAs migrates all follows atomically; invalid Move without alsoKnownAs rejected; suspended domain Move rejected; migration is idempotent; no double-migration","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:30:08Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:30:08Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-p99","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:30:11Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
